nasb.text: Then they said, “What further need do we have of testimony? For we have heard it ourselves from His own mouth.”

esv.text: Then they said, “What further testimony do we need? We have heard it ourselves from his own lips.”

cnv.text: 他們說：“我們還需要甚麼見證呢？我們親自聽見他所說的話了。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“我们还需要什么见证呢？我们已经听见祂自己说的了。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“难道我们还需要什么证据吗？他亲口说的话，我们都亲耳听见了。”
